# Chapter 11: Multivariable calculus  (~100 pp)
- 11.1 Functions of many variables (10)
- 11.2 Partial derivatives, gradients (12)
- 11.3 Critical points: maxima, minima, saddles (15)
- 11.4 Lagrange multipliers (15)
- 11.5 Constrained optimisation preview (12)
- 11.6 Multiple integrals (15)
- 11.7 Change of variables, Jacobians (12)
- 11.8 Failure section: the high-dimensional space and our intuition's collapse (9)

**Archetype**: optimisation, scaling. **Project**: solve a constrained optimisation problem with three constraints by hand. **Exercises**: 35.
